title: Mithril over Gold
description: Turns everything Gold into the unused Mithril ore. For BTA
body:
## This texture pack was made for the Better than Adventure! mod. It will not work on regular Minecraft.

My first texture pack for Better than Adventure! and my best attempt at recreating how Mithril would have looked in game. Mithril replaces gold entirely, along with other miscellaneous gold items such as the golden apple, golden quiver, etc.

Comes with a texture pack and a language pack. For full immersion, _the language pack is recommended._
> To download the language pack, click on a version to see any additional files.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H8wkEPqkCKc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
